# The Aesthetic Brief — 2026-07-12

6 new item(s) worth your 5 minutes, grouped by category, most relevant first.

## Financial / Industry Trends

### Conscious Chemist, a Shark Tank India-featured skincare startup, has raised Rs 12 crore in a funding round from Atomic Capital. The startup has also appointed Apoorv Gautam, Atomic Capital's Founder and Managing Partner, to its board of directors. ----------- - instagram.com
